---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Blitz
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

What problem does this feature solve? What friction point does it remove?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## ADHD Use Case

How does this feature specifically help someone with ADHD? (e.g. reduces decision fatigue, helps with time blindness, supports hyperfocus, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar tools, or any other context.
